testcase.name: ProductErrorValidation

testcase.name: LogInErrorValidation

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: div[aria-label='Incorrect email or password.']' (tried for 5 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval)
